testcase.name: test_ws_broadcast_stats_overview_fields
testcase.error: tests/test_pdf_websocket.py:95: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ws_notify_alert
testcase.error: tests/test_pdf_websocket.py:95: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stats_data_matches_ici_metrics
testcase.error: tests/test_pdf_websocket.py:213: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
